name: Apify
description: Universal web scraping and data extraction via Apify — scrape any platform using 57+ actors across social media, maps, search, e-commerce, and more.

enabled.description: Enable the Apify plugin (default: true when apiKey is set).

apiKey.description: Apify API token (optional; defaults to APIFY_API_KEY env var).

cacheTtlMinutes.description: Cache TTL in minutes for completed run results (default: 15).

maxResults.description: Default max results per actor run (default: 20).

enabledTools.description: Which tools to register (default: all tools enabled).
